files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,10 @@
 
 ## 0.7.3 — Unreleased
 
+### Changed
+- API: streaming answers in a rich TTY now use Markdansi’s live renderer (`createLiveRenderer`) so we can stream *and* render Markdown in-place.
+- Dependencies: update `markdansi` to 0.1.5.
+
 ## 0.7.2 — 2025-12-17
 
 ### Fixed

-        version: https://codeload.github.com/steipete/Markdansi/tar.gz/c83d687e0b2146e158e37cb6e30cac8c6422286b

+        version: 0.1.5

         version: 6.14.0(ws@8.18.3)(zod@4.2.1)
